---
title: "Multi statement Python"
format: html
---

## Python

This code cell contains multiple Python statements.

```{python}
print("This is the first statement.")
print("This is the middle statement.")
print("This one is last.")
```

And this one contains multiple multi-line statements.

```{python}
print(1 +
    2 +
    3)
print(
    list(
        range(10)
    )
)
```
